core_mechanism: An involutive duality between two spaces realized as a fiberwise Fourier-type (Fourier-Mukai / SYZ) integral transform over a fibration by dual tori, which swaps the two dual spaces and interchanges two conjugate classes of objects parametrized by a moduli space under varying stability parameters.
brief_reason: The abstract constructs X^! from X via a 'SYZ construction' out of moduli of branes with varying stability conditions and realizes objects on X^! as SYZ transforms of objects in X, with the roles of X and X^! interchanged under the duality — a fiberwise dualizing transform that exchanges dual spaces and their conjugate object types.
